recommendations.title: Johnny Got His Gun
recommendations.overview: A young American soldier, rendered in pseudocoma from an artillery shell from WWI, recalls his life leading up to that point.

recommendations.title: Blood & Gold
recommendations.overview: At the end of World War II, a German soldier is looking for his daughter while an SS troop is looking for a Jewish treasure.

recommendations.title: The Painted Bird
recommendations.overview: After losing his parents, a young Jewish boy wanders Eastern Europe, seeking refuge during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Aftermath
recommendations.overview: In the aftermath of World War II, a British colonel and his wife are assigned to live in Hamburg during the post-war reconstruction, but tensions arise with the German widower who lives with them.

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.

recommendations.title: Where Hands Touch
recommendations.overview: Germany, 1944. Leyna, the 15-year old daughter of a white German mother and a black African father, meets Lutz, a compassionate member of the Hitler Youth whose father is a prominent Nazi soldier, and they form an unlikely connection in this quickly

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Firebird
recommendations.overview: At the height of the Cold War, a troubled soldier forms a forbidden love triangle with a daring fighter pilot and his female comrade amid the dangerous surroundings of a Soviet Air Force Base.

recommendations.title: Blood and Money
recommendations.overview: A retired veteran hunting in the Allagash backcountry of Maine discovers a dead woman with a duffle bag full of money. He soon finds himself in a web of deceit and murder.

recommendations.title: Jojo Rabbit
